question: Can cholesterol levels safely be lowered to near-zero without health risks?
topic: Corrects misconceptions about cholesterol being 'essential' from diet and fears of very low levels

sources.name: Dietary Reference Intakes for Energy, Carbohydrate, Fiber, Fat, Fatty Acids, Cholesterol, Protein, and Amino Acids

discovery_sources.text: LDL cholesterol can safely be lowered to near-zero levels without harm—should verify upper limits of safety data

discovery_sources.text: Babies are born with essentially zero LDL cholesterol—needs verification of baseline pediatric cholesterol values
